### Submission Checklist

**SKILL.md**
- [ ] File starts with valid YAML frontmatter enclosed in triple dashes (`---`)
- [ ] The `name` field in frontmatter exactly matches the folder name
- [ ] The `description` field is written in third person
- [ ] The `description` specifies both what the skill does AND when to activate it
- [ ] Instructions in the markdown body are direct and imperative
- [ ] At least one concrete input/output example is included
- [ ] Total instructions are under 5,000 tokens

**README.md**
- [ ] Explains what the skill does in plain language
- [ ] Lists compatible agents and provides install instructions
- [ ] Documents all dependencies
- [ ] Includes at least one real example of the skill working

**metadata.json**
- [ ] All required fields are present and filled in correctly
- [ ] `verified` is set to `false`
- [ ] `tested_on` contains only agents personally verified
- [ ] Tags are specific and useful for filtering

**Structure and Security**
- [ ] Skill folder is inside the correct category directory
- [ ] Folder name is lowercase-with-hyphens only
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys, tokens, passwords, or secrets anywhere
- [ ] If the skill makes network requests, this is documented in README.md
- [ ] If the skill includes scripts, they are readable and not obfuscated
